info.title: RealEST Property Marketplace API
info.description: Nigerian property marketplace API with ML validation, geospatial search, and intelligent matching

PropertyListing.description: Nigerian property listing for rent or sale

DocumentValidationResponse.description: Document validation result from ML pipeline

ImageValidationResponse.description: Image validation result from ML pipeline

post.description: Create a new property listing. Requires owner or agent role. Can submit as draft or for live listing.

400.description: Invalid property data or validation error

get.description: Search properties by location, type, price, and other filters. Returns paginated results.

post.description: Admin endpoint to validate a property document (PDF/JPEG) using ML and OCR.
Admin endpoint to validate a property image using ML services.
Admin endpoint to run duplicate detection for a property using images, location and description.

get.description: Retrieve complete property details including media, documents, and inquiries. Live properties are publicly viewable.

404.description: Property not found or not accessible

put.description: Update property details before verification. Only available for draft or pending properties. Requires owner role.

400.description: Invalid data or property is already verified

404.description: Property not found or access denied

delete.description: Delete a property listing. Only available for draft properties. Requires owner role.

404.description: Property not found or access denied

get.description: Retrieve all media (images, videos) associated with a property. Published properties are visible to all users; draft properties only to the owner.

404.description: Property not found or not accessible

post.description: Upload a new media file (image or video) to a property. Only property owner can upload. Media can only be added to draft properties.

400.description: Invalid request or property is published

404.description: Property not found or access denied

get.description: Retrieve all property documents (title deeds, permits, etc). Only accessible to property owner or admin.

post.description: Upload property verification documents (title deeds, permits, etc). Only owner can upload. Triggers ML validation service.

201.description: Document uploaded and submitted for verification

400.description: Invalid request or property is published

404.description: Property not found or access denied

get.description: Retrieve all reviews and ratings for a property. Only shows reviews for published properties. Includes pagination and rating statistics.

200.description: Reviews list with pagination and stats

post.description: Submit a review and rating for a property. Can review the owner or agent. Requires authentication.

400.description: Invalid request (comment too short or rating out of range)

post.description: Add a property to the authenticated user's saved/favorite properties. Property must be published.

delete.description: Remove a property from the authenticated user's saved/favorite properties.

post.description: Check for potential duplicate property listings based on address or geospatial proximity. Uses address matching and location-based radius search.

address.description: Address to check (optional, uses property address if not provided)

404.description: Property not found or access denied

get.description: Retrieve public property or listing details. Public view is available only for published (live) properties. Can retrieve owner-listed properties or agent-created listings via source parameter.

200.description: Public property details with all media and owner/agent info

404.description: Property not found or not published

get.description: Retrieve all properties owned or managed by the authenticated user. Only accessible to property owners and agents. Supports pagination.

403.description: User must be an owner or agent

get.description: Advanced property search with location, price, features, and Nigerian infrastructure filters. Supports geospatial radius search, pagination, and multiple sorting options.

200.description: Featured and matching properties with pagination

get.description: Retrieve all properties saved/favorited by the authenticated user.

post.description: Add a property to the authenticated user's saved properties list.

property_id.description: ID of the property to save

400.description: Invalid request or property already saved

404.description: Property not found or not available

delete.description: Remove a property from the authenticated user's saved properties list.

parameters.name: property_id
parameters.description: Property ID to remove from saved

get.description: Search verified, live properties with support for text search, filters, sorting, and geospatial queries. Results limited to verified properties.

parameters.name: radius
parameters.description: Search radius in kilometers (used with lat/long)

get.description: Get inquiries relevant to authenticated user. Users see inquiries they sent; owners see inquiries on their properties.

post.description: Send an inquiry about a property. Only users can send inquiries. Owner is automatically identified from property.

403.description: Forbidden - only users can send inquiries

404.description: Property not found or not available

get.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's profile information.

put.description: Update the authenticated user's profile information.

post.description: Attach a newly created profile to a referral code and trigger referral rewards and notifications.

404.description: Profile not found or attribution window expired

post.description: Send a password reset email with a recovery link and OTP. Returns a generic success response to prevent account enumeration.
Send a confirmation email after the user successfully changes their password.
Copy waitlist metadata and referral context to a newly created profile inside the sync window.

404.description: Profile not found or sync window expired

post.description: Validate the 6-digit reset code and exchange the stored token hash for a recovery session.

get.description: Return the authenticated owner or admin properties with pagination, status filtering, and sorting.

post.description: Create a new property listing from the owner dashboard and queue it for validation.

get.description: Retrieve all legal documents associated with a property.

404.description: Property not found or access denied

post.description: Upload a legal or compliance document for a property.

404.description: Property not found or access denied

post.description: Run duplicate detection for a dashboard listing using address, location, and title heuristics.

get.description: Retrieve all media files associated with a property in the dashboard.

404.description: Property not found or access denied

post.description: Upload a media file for a property and store the signed upload result.

400.description: Invalid file type, size, or missing file

404.description: Property not found or access denied

post.description: Renew a live or expired property listing and set it back to live status.

404.description: Property not found or access denied

get.description: Fetch a single property with all owner dashboard relations, media, documents, and inquiries.

404.description: Property not found or access denied

put.description: Update owner-managed property fields before verification.

404.description: Property not found or access denied

delete.description: Delete a draft, unlisted, or rejected property from the dashboard.

404.description: Property not found or access denied

get.description: Return inquiries received on properties owned by the authenticated owner.

post.description: Close an inquiry and notify the other party.
Send a response to an inquiry and mark it as responded.

403.description: Access denied - Only property owners can respond to inquiries

get.description: Fetch a single inquiry that belongs to the owner dashboard.

put.description: Update the status of an inquiry in the owner dashboard.

get.description: Get properties waiting for admin review or in a specific status.

put.description: Approve a property for vetting or reject it from the admin queue.

400.description: Property ID is required or invalid data

post.description: Create a property from the admin console and link it to the internal RealEST Connect listings account.

get.description: Generate admin vetting summary statistics for a chosen time period and status filter.

post.description: Invite a new sub-admin by creating a user, profile, and reset link.

get.description: Return a searchable, paginated list of platform users for admin management.
List properties awaiting ML validation with paging and status filters.
List properties in the vetting queue with paging and urgency filters.

post.description: Approve, reject, schedule, or flag a property in the vetting workflow.

404.description: Property not found or not eligible for vetting

post.description: Admin action that approves or rejects an agent account.
Send a single template email to one waitlist subscriber.

delete.description: Delete a waitlist subscriber by ID. Admin only.

get.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's notifications and unread count.

post.description: Mark all notifications as read for the authenticated user.
Send a referral invite email using the inviter's referral code.

400.description: Invalid JSON body or missing fields

get.description: Return the authenticated user's referral summary and progress.
Resolve a referral code to inviter details and milestone context.
Return categorized Nigerian property amenities with optional category and search filtering.
Resolve a Nigerian address into coordinates and address components.
Check database connectivity and application health metrics.
Return application mode, feature flags, and operational statistics.

post.description: Create a signed URL for direct file upload to storage.
Subscribe a user to the waitlist and trigger referral/cohort workflows.

get.description: Return configured Resend audiences and database-backed audience segments with counts.
Return paginated admin email campaigns with optional status filtering.

post.description: Create a draft email campaign for a Resend audience or database segment.

get.description: Render a campaign template to HTML for preview in the admin UI.
Return recipients for a Resend audience or database-backed campaign segment.
Return a single admin email campaign with owner details.

delete.description: Delete a campaign while it is still in draft status.

409.description: Campaign is not in draft status

post.description: Execute a draft or scheduled campaign send using Resend broadcast or batch delivery.

409.description: Campaign cannot be sent in its current status

get.description: Render a selected email template to HTML for preview in the admin UI.

post.description: Render an email template and send it to a single recipient for admin validation.

500.description: Failed to render or send email

get.description: High-level platform analytics: users, properties, inquiries, admin actions and optional trend data. Admin-only.
Aggregated poll responses with totals and breakdowns by campaign ref tag. Admin-only.
Referral program summary: top referrers and referred entries (admin-only).
Fetch time-series metric data for a given metric identifier (users, properties, inquiries, revenue, performance). Admin-only.

put.description: Admin endpoint to resolve a suspected duplicate property listing (keep both, keep master, reject duplicate).

put.summary: Admin ML validation update for property
put.description: Admin endpoint to apply ML validation results and update property status.
Admin endpoint to approve (live) or reject a property during physical vetting.

get.description: Admin endpoint to fetch a single user profile, stats, properties and recent inquiries.

post.description: Admin endpoint to suspend, unsuspend, ban, or unban a user account.

post.summary: Update ML validation status for a property
post.description: Admin endpoint to approve/reject/flag a property after ML validation.

tags.name: Properties - Public
tags.description: Public property discovery and detail pages

tags.name: Properties
tags.description: Public property browsing and listing operations

tags.name: Admin - Validation
tags.description: ML, duplicate, image, and document checks

tags.name: Admin - Emails
tags.description: Campaigns, previews, audiences, and test sends
